items.name: calesthio/OpenMontage
items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
items.description_zh: 世界上第一个开源的代理视频制作系统。 12条管道、52种工具、500+座席技能。将您的人工智能编码助手变成一个完整的视频制作工作室。

items.name: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
items.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
items.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——以毫秒为单位的平均存储库。 158 种语言，亚毫秒级查询，标记减少 99%。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖性。

items.name: BuilderIO/agent-native
items.description: A framework for building agent-native applications.
items.description_zh: 用于构建代理本机应用程序的框架。

items.name: penpot/penpot
items.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration
items.description_zh: Penpot：用于设计和代码协作的开源设计工具

items.name: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
items.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
items.description_zh: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

items.name: jamiepine/voicebox
items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
items.description_zh: 开源人工智能语音工作室。克隆、指令、创造。

items.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.description_zh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。

items.name: koala73/worldmonitor
items.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
items.description_zh: 实时全球情报仪表板。在统一的态势感知界面中进行人工智能驱动的新闻聚合、地缘政治监控和基础设施跟踪

items.name: stablyai/orca
items.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
items.description_zh: Orca 是与一组并行代理一起工作的 ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

items.name: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
items.description: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0
items.description_zh: AI 代理的 817 项结构化网络安全技能 · 映射到 6 个框架：MITRE ATT&CK、NIST CSF 2.0、MITRE ATLAS、D3FEND、NIST AI RMF 和 MITRE F3（打击欺诈） · Agentskills.io 标准 · 可与 Claude Code、GitHub Copilot、Codex CLI、Cursor、Gemini CLI 和 20 多个平台配合使用 · 29 个安全域 · Apache 2.0

items.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.description_zh: 从 Anthropic 中提取的系统提示 - Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、Claude Code、Claude Design。 OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 思维、GPT 5.5 即时、Codex。 Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash、3.1 Pro、反重力。 xAI - Grok、Cursor、Copilot、VS Code、Perplexity 等。定期更新。

items.name: interviewstreet/hiring-agent
items.description: AI agent to evaluate and score resumes.
items.description_zh: 人工智能代理对简历进行评估和评分。

items.name: google-labs-code/design.md
items.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
items.description_zh: 用于向编码代理描述视觉标识的格式规范。 DESIGN.md 使代理能够对设计系统有持久的、结构化的理解。

items.name: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
items.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
items.description_zh: 使用 AI 编码代理通过一个命令克隆任何网站

items.name: mattpocock/skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.description_zh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

items.name: aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
items.description: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS
items.description_zh: AWS 支持的官方 MCP 服务器、技能和插件可帮助 AI 代理在 AWS 上构建

items.name: Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
items.description: #1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere
items.description_zh: GitHub 上排名第一的 PDF 应用程序，可让您在任何地方的任何设备上编辑 PDF

items.name: Kong/insomnia
items.description: The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC. With Cloud, Local and Git storage.
items.description_zh: 适用于 GraphQL、REST、WebSockets、SSE 和 gRPC 的开源、跨平台 API 客户端。具有云、本地和 Git 存储。
